Active Planned Care / GoalsStart DateReason
Hyperlipidemia clinical management plan10-Aug-1996Hyperlipidemia (disorder)
  • Achieve LDL cholesterol less than 1.8 mmol/L in patient with ischemic heart disease and metabolic syndrome.
  • Achieve total cholesterol less than 4.0 mmol/L.
  • Achieve triglycerides less than 1.7 mmol/L.
  • Achieve HDL cholesterol greater than 1.0 mmol/L.
Diabetes self management plan22-Jun-1991Prediabetes (finding)
  • Patient will attend diabetes self-management education sessions to improve understanding of prediabetes and lifestyle modifications.
  • Maintain fasting plasma glucose within recommended range for prediabetes.
  • Maintain HbA1c below threshold for diabetes diagnosis.
  • Achieve and maintain weight loss as recommended for prediabetes management.
Care plan10-Feb-1982Obstructive sleep apnea syndrome (disorder)
  • Reduce the Apnea-Hypopnea Index (AHI) to less than 5 events per hour to achieve effective control of obstructive sleep apnea.
  • Improve subjective sleep quality as reported by the patient, with fewer nighttime awakenings and increased feeling of restfulness upon waking.
  • Reduce daytime sleepiness as measured by the Epworth Sleepiness Scale to a score of less than 10.
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension02-Apr-1977Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Patient will achieve and maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle changes.
Immunization RecommendationDue DateReason
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product01-Oct-2026Annual seasonal influenza vaccination
